name: Bacardi Rum Cake
recipeInstructions:
FOR CAKE: Preheat oven to 325°F. Grease and flour a 10-inch tube or 13-cup Bundt pan. Sprinkle nuts over bottom of pan. Mix all cake ingredients together. Pour batter into the prepared pan. Bake for 1 hour. Cool. Invert cake onto serving plate. Prick top in several places with a fork tines or toothpick. Drizzle and smooth glaze evenly over top and sides. Allow cake to absorb glaze. Repeat until glaze is used completely.
FOR GLAZE: Melt butter in a saucepan. Stir in water and sugar. Boil for 5 minutes, stirring constantly. Remove from heat. Stir in rum. OPTIONAL: Decorate with whole maraschino cherries and border of sugar frosting or whipped cream. Serve with seedless green grapes dusted with powdered sugar.
